dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7956 IH: State Offices of Rural Health Program Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Fedorchak (for herself and Mr. Carter of Louisiana) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the State offices of rural health program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the State Offices of Rural Health Program Reauthorization Act of 2026.
Paragraph (1) of section 338J(i) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254r(i)) is amended to read as follows:

paragraph.text: For the purpose of making grants under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated—

subparagraph.text: $12,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027; and
$13,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2028 through 2032.
